triageFlags.title: Loan-to-Value (LTV) Calculation Missing
triageFlags.description: The Loan-to-Value percentage is not calculated in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the LTV using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it meets the maximum allowable LTV for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy specifies that LTV is a critical factor in determining loan eligibility and must be calculated as (Total Advance) / (Vehicle Trade Price). The current proposal does not provide this value, which is necessary for compliance with the underwriting policy.

triageFlags.title: Debt-to-Income (DTI) Ratio Calculation Missing
triageFlags.description: The Debt-to-Income ratio is not calculated in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the DTI using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it meets the maximum allowable DTI for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy mandates the calculation of DTI to assess affordability. The absence of this calculation prevents a complete evaluation of the applicant's financial capacity to meet the loan obligations.

content.reasoning: The proposal was reviewed against the underwriting policy manual. The applicant's credit score places them in Tier A, which allows for a maximum DTI of 45% and an LTV of 110%. However, the proposal lacks the necessary calculations for Loan-to-Value (LTV) and Debt-to-Income (DTI) ratios, which are critical for assessing compliance with these thresholds. These omissions prevent a full evaluation of the proposal's adherence to policy.
